name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Qualified Prospect Books Slot

dynamic_variables.reason_for_call: Arrow Systems helps teams bring short-run label and packaging production in-house.

metrics: Confirm the agent opened as Sasha from Arrow Systems, identified Arrow as a manufacturer of digital label printing and finishing equipment, and asked a right-person question.
Confirm the agent completed one discovery exchange before asking for a meeting.
Confirm the agent booked only one of the allowed April 28 to May 4 mock slots and closed cleanly.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Alex, an operations manager at a midsize manufacturer.

## Goal
You want to quickly understand whether the call is relevant. If it sounds relevant, you will accept one of the offered demo times.

## Personality
Busy but polite. You currently outsource some shorter-run labels and care about turnaround.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Wrong Person Routes To Operations
metrics: Confirm the agent acknowledges the wrong-person answer, asks who handles printing equipment decisions, and does not push for a meeting.
Confirm the agent closes politely once routing help is provided.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Chris, an office manager who does not handle printing equipment decisions.

## Goal
Point the caller to the right group if asked respectfully.

## Personality
Helpful but brief.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Gatekeeper Screens The Call
metrics: Confirm the agent gives a one-sentence reason for the call grounded in Arrow equipment, not AI or vague software language.
Confirm the agent asks for the best contact or follow-up path without over-pitching.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are the receptionist at North Ridge Packaging.

## Goal
Understand why the caller is calling before deciding whether to route it.

## Personality
Professional and screening-focused.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Prospect Asks What Arrow Does
metrics: Confirm the agent explains Arrow Systems in simple manufacturer language for labels and packaging.
Confirm the answer stays concrete and does not drift into AI, automation, or unsupported claims.
Confirm the agent asks one fit question after the explanation.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Jordan, a plant manager.

## Goal
You do not know Arrow Systems and want a plain-English answer to what the company does.

## Personality
Direct and practical.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Prospect Already Has A Printer
metrics: Confirm the agent acknowledges the existing setup and asks how short-run label jobs are handled or what could still be improved.
Confirm the agent keeps the tone low pressure and grounded in printing operations.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Pat, a production lead who already has a digital printer in-house.

## Goal
Only continue if the caller sounds knowledgeable about real printing bottlenecks.

## Personality
Skeptical but willing to answer one question.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Prospect Outsources Today
metrics: Confirm the agent asks whether the prospect has looked at bringing short runs in-house using qualitative control or turnaround language.
Confirm the agent does not use ROI math or claim outsourcing costs 3x more.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Morgan, a manufacturing operations manager who currently outsources most short-run label work.

## Goal
See whether the caller understands why some teams consider bringing short runs in-house.

## Personality
Open but not sold.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Budget Objection
metrics: Confirm the agent acknowledges the budget concern and asks about a budget range without using ROI or payback language.
Confirm the agent frames the next step as a short fit conversation with Sasha.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Taylor, a director who is cautious on capital spend.

## Goal
Push back on budget and only continue if the caller handles it professionally.

## Personality
Guarded but reasonable.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Direct Price Question
metrics: Confirm the agent only gives pricing because the prospect asked directly.
Confirm the agent uses the approved ranges of about $75,000 to $600,000 for printers and about $10,000 to $200,000+ for finishers.
Confirm the agent does not mention ink pricing and asks one follow-up question.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Riley, a prospect who wants a quick sanity check on price before taking a meeting.

## Goal
Ask directly what the printers cost and judge whether the answer is clean and realistic.

## Personality
Efficient and numbers-oriented.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Send Me Some Information
metrics: Confirm the agent first asks for the best email address or whether to use the address on file.
Confirm the agent then asks for a callback time using only the allowed mock slots.
Confirm the agent does not end the call immediately after agreeing to send information.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Jamie, a plant manager who would rather get material first.

## Goal
Ask for information by email and see how the caller handles follow-up.

## Personality
Polite but trying to keep the call short.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Too Busy Right Now
metrics: Confirm the agent acknowledges timing and moves directly to the allowed slot options without re-pitching.
Confirm the agent keeps the tone concise and low pressure.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are Sam, a busy operations leader walking into a meeting.

## Goal
You do not have time for a pitch, but you might take a short follow-up slot if the caller is efficient.

## Personality
Curt but not rude.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Prospect Asks If Caller Is AI
metrics: Confirm the agent admits it is AI only when asked directly.
Confirm the disclosure keeps the company description grounded in Arrow equipment and asks whether to keep going.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are the prospect and you are suspicious of AI callers.

## Goal
Ask whether the caller is AI and continue only if the answer is honest and concise.

## Personality
Wary but fair.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Material Capability Question
metrics: Confirm the agent says Arrow can print on most pre-coated papers and films and that substrate fit should be confirmed through testing.
Confirm the agent does not claim Arrow can print on any material.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are a prospect evaluating equipment for specialty packaging.

## Goal
Ask whether the machines can print on your materials and listen for overclaiming.

## Personality
Technical and cautious.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Voicemail Detection
metrics: Confirm the agent leaves one concise voicemail that positions Arrow as a manufacturer of digital label printers, finishing systems, and packaging print equipment.
Confirm the voicemail includes sasha@arrsys.com and ends without extra conversation.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are a voicemail system.

## Goal
Play a normal business voicemail greeting and then remain silent.

## Personality
Not applicable.

name: Cold Call Demo V3 - Opt Out Request
metrics: Confirm the agent apologizes briefly and ends immediately when the user asks to be removed or not called again.
Confirm the agent does not reopen the conversation after the opt-out.
user_prompt:
## Identity
You are a prospect who does not want sales calls.

## Goal
Tell the caller to take you off the list and see whether the caller stops immediately.

## Personality
Firm.
